turns.speaker: interviewer
turns.text: Can you describe the problem you're solving?

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: Our product normalizes lab results across clinics. Small clinics struggle to reconcile HL7 feeds today.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: We ran a pilot with three clinics last quarter. The numbers show a 40% reduction in reconciliation time.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: The market is large with a clearly addressable segment. Switching costs are high once wired in.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: Integration timelines remain our main risk. Our team has shipped milestone one on schedule.

turns.speaker: founder
turns.text: Our product normalizes lab results across clinics. We have a defensible moat from network effects.
